## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-driven content creation services to Composio for potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Composio seeks to improve ROI on content creation, currently producing 5-6 blogs/week without significant traffic increase](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content strategy and creation, leveraging AI workflows and expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach includes a $20k strategy sprint (6-8 weeks) followed by 12-month growth execution ($12-15k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Case studies (Ramp, AugmentCode) demonstrate significant traffic growth (10x+) within 6 months using GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)

## Topics

### Composio's Current Content Strategy

  - [In-house team: 1 technical writer + 5 contractors (technical writers)](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Output: 5-6 blogs per week](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Challenge: Content not driving significant traffic or sign-ups](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Using SEO agency for identifying opportunities, not content creation](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [End-to-end partner for content strategy and creation](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Two-phase approach:](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
    1.  Strategy sprint (6-8 weeks, $20k fixed fee)
          - [Deep research, persona creation, topic clustering](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
          - [Begins publishing by week 4-5](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
    2.  Growth execution (12 months, $12-15k/month)
  - [AI-driven workflows with expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Replaces need for separate SEO agency](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [Includes LLM monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [Future plans to open platform for client use](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)

### GrowthX's Expertise and Track Record

  - [Founded by Marcel (ex-IBM, HP, HashiCorp, ServiceTitan, Deepgram)](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Notable successes:](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - [IBM's SecurityIntelligence.com: $17M+ revenue](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - [HP newsletter: 1M+ monthly visitors, 200k+ subscribers](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
      - [Deepgram: 24x traffic increase, 4x revenue growth](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Current clients include technical companies (e.g., Abnormal AI, Sentinel-1)](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)

### Case Studies

1.  Ramp
      - [700+ pages created](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
      - [Examples: Quarterly taxes guide, per diem calculator, expense category classifier](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [Interactive elements and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
2.  AugmentCode
      - [Created comprehensive guide section](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
      - [10x traffic growth in 6 months (3k to 50-60k monthly organic visits)](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
3.  Kiro
      - [10x traffic growth in 6 months from minimal domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send overview presentation and additional examples](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Sujay to review materials and consider value of GrowthX's approach](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting this week if interested (GrowthX has 4-6 week wait for kickoffs)](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [Potential deeper dive with VP of Customer Growth or CEO Marcel if needed](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Sujay to respond via email for next steps](https://fathom.video/share/qWTKw1qwoajkDq4AWJzfBX729xmJCZam?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
